_comment: Catalog of known/recommended external skill repositories for agent-meta.
_comment_usage: The agent-meta-manager agent reads this file to help users discover and add external skills via --add-skill. Entries here are NOT yet registered as submodules — use --add-skill to register them. Skills already registered live in external-skills.config.json.

home-organization.name: Home Organization Specialist
home-organization.description: Spezialist für 3D-gedruckte Heimorganisationssysteme — Gridfinity, OpenGrid, NeoGrid, French Cleat, Underware, Deskware. Hilft bei Auswahl, Kombination und Konfiguration passender Systeme.

opengrid-openscad.name: OpenGrid OpenSCAD Designer
opengrid-openscad.description: Spezialist für OpenSCAD-Code-Generierung für wandmontierte OpenGrid/MultiConnect-Organizer (28mm Grid, QuackWorks-Patterns). Generiert parametrischen SCAD-Code für Halter, Körbe und Organizer.
